episode.title: Lighting Decisions That Save a Shoot

feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about lighting design, and I'm joined by Daniel Olufemi, commercial lighting director. Daniel Olufemi, thanks for being here.
Walk me through a concrete example. What's something you used to believe about this that you've revised?
Here's how I think about it. On location, the first decision is always: am I shaping the existing light? We've seen this play out at teams using Adobe. Once you internalize that, the rest of the de…
